name: csv_to_json
description: Convert a CSV file to JSON, remapping column names according to a provided mapping. Only mapped columns are included in the output. Results are saved to a JSON file. Supports type conversion via 'type' field: 'string' (default, keeps as string), 'number' (parse as number), 'json' (parse JSON string into object/array, e.g. for arrays like '["a","b"]').

path.description: Absolute path to the CSV file to convert

mapping.description: List of column mappings from CSV column names to desired JSON property names

type.description: Type conversion: 'string' (default), 'number' (parse as number), 'json' (parse JSON string into object/array)
